name: 语境与文化
subject: english
domain_name: 阅读与文本分析 / Reading & Textual Analysis / Reading
curriculum_points: "Language is socially constructed and dependent on the number and nature of our social interactions and relationships."
"Acquisition of more than one language enriches personal development and helps facilitate international-mindedness."
"Exposure to and experience with languages, with all their richness and diversity, creates an inquisitiveness about life and learning, and a confidence about creating new social interactions."

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
